summary: Frontend testing of NASSAQ iteration 52 features: Sidebar menu changes, preview mode improvements, and navigation fixes. 5 out of 6 features verified working correctly. One minor navigation issue found.

integration_issues.issue: Back button 'العودة للمنصة' navigates to /admin instead of /admin/tenants. Code shows navigate('/admin/tenants') but actual behavior goes to /admin. Likely race condition with ProtectedRoute redirect.

action_items: Fix back button navigation: Change navigate('/admin/tenants') to navigate('/admin/tenants', { replace: true }) or add slight delay after exitSchoolContext() in PrincipalDashboard.jsx handleExitImpersonation function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested UI changes verified except back button navigation. Platform Admin sidebar correctly removed 'إدارة القواعد'. Preview mode has sticky orange banner. School Principal sidebar shows 'إعدادات المدرسة' and 'الجدول المدرسي'. 'عرض الجدول' button navigates to /school/schedule. No back button in sidebar.

rules_management_removed_from_sidebar.evidence: Platform Admin sidebar shows: مركز القيادة, إدارة المدارس, إدارة المستخدمين, مراقبة النظام, التقارير والتحليلات, التكاملات, مركز الأمان, سجلات التدقيق, التواصل والإشعارات, إعدادات النظام. 'إدارة القواعد' NOT present.

preview_mode_sticky_orange_banner.evidence: Banner found with classes: 'sticky top-0 z-50 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 via-orange-500 to-amber-500'. Text shows 'أنت الآن تعاين مدرسة: مدرسة النور'

back_to_platform_button_navigation.evidence: Button 'العودة للمنصة' found and clickable. Navigates to /admin instead of /admin/tenants. Code shows correct target but redirect happens.

no_back_button_in_sidebar.evidence: Checked sidebar for 'العودة للمنصة', 'العودة', 'رجوع', 'Back to Platform', 'Back' - none found

view_schedule_button_navigation.evidence: 'عرض الجدول' button with data-testid='quick-action-view-schedule' navigates to /school/schedule

school_settings_in_sidebar.evidence: School Principal sidebar shows 'إعدادات المدرسة' (School Settings). Old name 'إعدادات مدير المدرسة' NOT present.

test_execution_details.test_1_platform_admin_sidebar: Logged in as admin@nassaq.com, verified sidebar menu items, confirmed 'إدارة القواعد' removed
test_execution_details.test_2_preview_mode_banner: Navigated to /admin/tenants, clicked 'فتح لوحة التحكم', verified orange sticky banner appears
test_execution_details.test_3_back_button_navigation: Clicked 'العودة للمنصة' button, observed navigation to /admin instead of /admin/tenants
test_execution_details.test_4_sidebar_no_back_button: Logged in as principal1@nassaq.com, verified no back button in sidebar
test_execution_details.test_5_view_schedule_button: Clicked 'عرض الجدول' button, verified navigation to /school/schedule
test_execution_details.test_6_school_settings_name: Verified sidebar shows 'إعدادات المدرسة' not 'إعدادات مدير المدرسة'
